name: Stuffed Baked Ham
recipeIngredient: 1 10 lb fully cooked, half ham - chopped
1 package Frozen chopped kale; thawed - 3/4 cup packed watercress
1 package Frozen chopped spinach; thawed - 1/2 cup packed celery leaves
1 large onion; peeled, coarsely chopped - 1/4 teaspoon pepper
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------GLAZE-----------------------------------
1/2 cup honey
2 tablespoons dry ginger
2 tablespoons cider vinegar (optional)
Watercress for garnish (optional)
1. Remove rind from ham if present.
2. Trim all but about 1/4 inch of fat from the ham.
3. Squeeze out excess water from thawed kale and spinach, then place in food processor with onion, watercress, celery leaves, salt, and pepper. Pulse until finely chopped.
4. Press vegetable mixture into cavities cut into the ham, packing it well.
5. Place ham fat side up in a shallow baking pan.
6. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
7. Bake for 2 hours.
8. Stir together honey, vinegar, mustard, and ginger. Brush glaze onto ham.
9. Continue baking and basting for 30 minutes until ham is glazed.
10. Remove from oven and let rest for 20 minutes before carving.
11. Carve carefully, holding slices to keep stuffing in place.
12. Garnish platter with watercress if desired.
